title: Explore Premiere features | Adobe
metaDescription: Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to edit videos, animate titles, add effects, mix sound and more.

og.title: Explore Premiere features | Adobe
og.description: Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to edit videos, animate titles, add effects, mix sound and more.

headings.text: Improve your workflow and take your videos to the next level with powerful, timesaving tools and AI features.
Color Mode — a new era starts now.
Fast track how you mask with AI.
Any shape mask. All the control.
Media Intelligence. A better way to search.
Go from generating to editing, fast.
Stay in your creative flow with precise, intuitive editing and trimming tools.
Magically extend your clips with Generative Extend.
Choose from hundreds of built-in transitions and effects. Or customize a professionally designed filter to create your own look.
Easy animation tools for any video editor.
Craft compelling titles, graphics, and captions quickly and easily without leaving Premiere.
Create captions with Speech to Text.
Convey the right mood with advanced tools for color correction, adjustments to color grading, and more.
Get a head start with color management.
Give your footage a signature look.
Edit sound, clean up dialogue, add audio effects, record voiceovers, mix your soundtrack, and more.
Sculpt your sound with audio effects.
Finalize and share videos fast without ever leaving Premiere.
Change aspect ratios easily with AI.
Collaborate and deliver faster with Frame.io.
Now available from Adobe and YouTube: A dedicated space and exclusive content to create YouTube Shorts — right inside Premiere on iPhone.
What can you create in Premiere?
Video editing for social media: 5 tips to follow.
Create effective training videos that keep the viewer’s attention.
Create travel videos that inspire wanderlust.
Make a music video that rocks (or swings, grooves, or jams)
Creative Cloud Pro for students and teachers

landmarks.innerText:
Home
/
Adobe Creative Cloud
/
Adobe Premiere
/
Features

Premiere

Explore Adobe Premiere features.

Learn all about the tools and techniques you can use to edit videos, animate titles, add effects, mix sound, and more.

Update Premiere

What's new
Editing
Effects
Title
Color
Audio
Exporting
Improve your workflow and take your videos to the next level with powerful, timesaving tools and AI features.
Color Mode — a new era starts now.

Experience a first-of-its-kind color grading system — purpose-built for editors — in Premiere (beta). Shape, explore, and push your look like never before. Learn more

Fast track how you mask with AI.

Say hello to Object Mask and goodbye to hours of painful rotoscoping. Just hover over your subject, click, and watch as AI accurately masks and tracks it.

Any shape mask. All the control.

Redesigned shape masks now track motion faster across frames with pinpoint accuracy. Perfect for tackling precise color and effects work with ease.

Over 100 next-level effects and transitions.

Elevate your edit with all-new transitions, effects, and animations — they're cinematic and GPU-accelerated for real-time playback.

Media Intelligence. A better way to search.

Search footage in seconds by describing sound effects, like barking dogs or rain — or by keying in specific dialogue. Quickly locate alt takes and visually similar clips. And censor any unwanted words with a click.

Go from generating to editing, fast.

Generate video in Adobe Firefly Boards or on the web app, then send your project-ready clip directly to Premiere on desktop. Generate eye-grabbing visual effects, beautiful b-roll to fill timeline gaps, or anything you can imagine.

Explore the Premiere User Guide
Now available from Adobe and YouTube: A dedicated space and exclusive content to create YouTube Shorts — right inside Premiere on iPhone.

Learn more

What can you create in Premiere?

Find out how to use the tools and features in Premiere to make professional movies, music videos, podcasts, commercials, and more.

Premiere FEATURES

Video editing for social media: 5 tips to follow.

Premiere FEATURES
